auth.label: API Key
auth.description: Claid API key used with the Authorization Bearer header. Create or manage it from the Claid API Keys page: https://claid.ai/account/api

actions.name: edit_image
actions.description: Edit one publicly accessible image with Claid's synchronous image editing API and return the processed image metadata.

input.description: The public input image URL or Claid storage URI sent to Claid.

restorations.description: The restorations options sent to Claid.

adjustments.description: The adjustments options sent to Claid.

background.description: The background options sent to Claid.

resizing.description: The resizing options sent to Claid.

privacy.description: The privacy options sent to Claid.

generative.description: The generative options sent to Claid.

anyOf.description: The explicit output destination URL or storage URI.

destination.description: The explicit output destination URL or storage URI.

anyOf.description: The detailed CMYK color space configuration.

color_space.description: The color space configuration sent to Claid.

metadata.description: The output metadata options accepted by Claid.

progressive.description: Whether progressive JPEG output should be used.

format.description: The output format configuration accepted by Claid.

output.description: The output destination or options accepted by Claid.

inputSchema.description: The Claid image edit request payload.

ext.description: The file extension returned by Claid.

mps.description: The megapixel count returned by Claid.

mime.description: The MIME type returned by Claid.

format.description: The file format returned by Claid.

anyOf.description: The temporary public output URL returned by Claid.

input.description: The Claid image metadata object returned for an input or output image.

ext.description: The file extension returned by Claid.

mps.description: The megapixel count returned by Claid.

mime.description: The MIME type returned by Claid.

format.description: The file format returned by Claid.

anyOf.description: The temporary public output URL returned by Claid.

output.description: The Claid image metadata object returned for an input or output image.

profiling.description: The optional profiling object returned by Claid.

result.description: The normalized synchronous Claid edit result.

outputSchema.description: The normalized synchronous Claid edit response.

actions.name: get_edit_task
actions.description: Poll one Claid async image editing task by ID and return its current status plus the finished result when available.

inputSchema.description: The Claid async task to retrieve.

anyOf.description: The Claid result polling URL when returned.

created_at.description: The task creation timestamp returned by Claid.

input.description: The input image URL or storage URI sent to Claid.

restorations.description: The restorations options sent to Claid.

adjustments.description: The adjustments options sent to Claid.

output.description: The output destination or options accepted by Claid.

request.description: The request object echoed by Claid async tasks.

error.description: The error text returned by Claid.

created_at.description: The timestamp when this error was created.

ext.description: The file extension returned by Claid.

mps.description: The megapixel count returned by Claid.

mime.description: The MIME type returned by Claid.

format.description: The file format returned by Claid.

anyOf.description: The temporary public output URL returned by Claid.

input_object.description: The Claid image metadata object returned for an input or output image.

items.description: One async processing error returned by Claid.

errors.description: The task errors returned by Claid.

ext.description: The file extension returned by Claid.

mps.description: The megapixel count returned by Claid.

mime.description: The MIME type returned by Claid.
